strategy: Round 1 he summons three Protection Pox and Blinding-Lights the whole team (accuracy down) — overwrite the Blinding Light with your own Aura before attacking, or pack accuracy so you don't fizzle.
Round 2 he blankets his side with Guardian Spirit (revive at 100% health on defeat), so either strip those Guardian Spirits or plan to kill each target twice.
He has no school resist (only 20% to Globals), so hit hard with your best school.
Use a blade-stacked AoE to clear the Protection Pox alongside him, accounting for the Guardian Spirit revive.
Burst his 6,000 health once the revives are handled.
cheatNotes: He opens by summoning three Protection Pox and Blinding-Lighting the team (accuracy down) — replace the Blinding Light with your own Aura or bring accuracy so you don't fizzle.
Round 2 he casts AoE Guardian Spirit (revive at 100% health on defeat) across his side — strip it or expect to kill each target twice; a single big hit won't stick.
